message: I think the jalapeño kick might actually be what makes this work - people are going to taste that first and everything else clicks.
Yeah, that's exactly the read I was after - the heat as the entry point, everything else follows. Going live now feels right.
Marcus nailed it and he KNOWS it - and I'm not going to second-guess him right now because honestly? We're live. This is it. I can feel it's right.
It's live. Now we wait and see if the heat reads the way it should in people's actual kitchens, not ours.
Margaret's right - there's always that gap between intention and kitchen reality, the thing no amount of workshopping catches.
That gap's why we tested it three times. We did the work. Go home.
